title: helianthemum racemosum
intro: Helianthemum racemosum, also known as Rockrose, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cistaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Helianthemum racemosum include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
